datasetPreview.sampleNote: Full viewer unavailable — showing the Hub's sample preview ({{count}} rows).
datasetPreview.unavailable: The dataset viewer isn't available for this dataset. You can still browse its files, or open it on the Hub.

create.bodyPlaceholder: Describe your discussion or change… Markdown is supported.
create.prHint: Opens an empty draft pull request with your description as its first comment — push commits to its refs/pr branch afterwards.
create.title: New thread in {{repoId}}

discussions.signInToReply: Sign in to join the discussion.

editor.mentionHint: Type to mention a user or org
editor.previewEmpty: Nothing to preview yet — write something first.
editor.uploadHint: Attach images, audio, or video by dragging, pasting, or

favoritesEmpty.body: Star repositories while browsing to pin them here.
favoritesEmpty.title: No favorites yet

gate.ask: This repository is gated — request access to download and preview it.
gate.granted: You have been granted access to this repository.
gate.needsSession: Submitting an access request needs a Hub web session — connect one in Settings → Account.
gate.pending: Your access request is pending the authors' review.
gate.requestBody: Fill in the conditions the authors of {{repoId}} require. Your username and email address will be shared with them.

like.onHub: Likes need a Hub web session — connect one in Settings → Account, or open the repo on the Hub to like it.
like.sessionExpired: Your Hub web session expired. Reconnect it in Settings → Account to like from the app.

maintainer.mergeConfirmBody: This merges the pull request into the repository. This action cannot be undone.

playground.placeholder: Send a prompt to this model via the Inference API…
playground.signIn: Sign in to use the inference playground.
playground.unavailable: Inference is unavailable for this model: {{error}}

pr.diffTruncated: This diff was truncated — only part of the changes are shown.

preview.mediaErrorBody: This media file couldn't be played here. Download it to open locally.
preview.noPreviewBody: This file type can't be previewed here. Download it to inspect locally.
preview.pdfErrorBody: This PDF couldn't be rendered here. Download it to open locally.
preview.pickFileBody: Choose a file on the left to see its contents here.

run.notRunning: The Space is currently in the "{{stage}}" state, so it can't run here. Open it on the Hub to wake or restart it.

select.body: Pick an item from the list — or press ⌘K to search everything.
select.title: Nothing selected

parquetPreview.unsupportedCodec: This file uses a compression codec that can't be previewed. Download it to open locally.
parquetPreview.unreadableBody: The file's metadata couldn't be read. Download it to open it locally.

arrowPreview.prefixOnly: Only the first {{size}} of this file was loaded for preview.
arrowPreview.unreadableBody: The Arrow/Feather table couldn't be parsed from the file prefix. Download it to open locally.

ggufPreview.unreadableBody: The GGUF header couldn't be parsed (it may need more than the preview window). Download it to inspect locally.

onnxPreview.tooLargeBody: ONNX files larger than {{size}} can't be previewed here (weights are usually embedded). Download it to inspect locally.
onnxPreview.unreadableBody: The ONNX model protobuf couldn't be decoded. Download it to open locally.
